[missing on one branch]
code: E0500
message: property `A::x` is not initialized on every path before constructor fallthrough completes
help:
span: 51..82
[missing on every path]
code: E0500
message: property `A::x` is not initialized before constructor fallthrough completes
help:
span: 44..46
[early return]
code: E0500
message: property `A::x` is not initialized before explicit return completes
help:
span: 46..53
[read before initialization]
code: E0501
message: property `A::x` is read before it is initialized
help:
span: 51..59
[incomplete this]
code: E0503
message: `$this` cannot be observed or passed from `A::__construct` before `$x` is initialized
help: initialize every property before exposing the object under construction
span: 53..58
[duplicate readonly initialization]
code: E0412
message: readonly property `A::x` is already initialized on this constructor path
help:
span: 62..70
[partial readonly repair]
code: E0502
message: readonly property `A::x` is initialized on only some incoming paths, so this assignment would initialize it twice on another path
help: initialize the readonly property exactly once in every branch
span: 81..89
[readonly loop initialization]
code: E0504
message: readonly property `A::x` cannot be initialized inside a repeatable constructor body
help: initialize the property on each non-repeating constructor path
span: 66..74
[writable loop initialization]
code: E0500
message: property `A::x` is not initialized on every path before constructor fallthrough completes
help:
span: 60..94
